title: Weekly Recruiting Cadence
content:
# Weekly Recruiting Cadence

## Week of March 3-9, 2026

### Daily Rhythm

| Time | Activity |
|------|----------|
| Morning | Check recruiting pipeline, respond to leads |
| Mid-day | Outreach (calls, texts, DMs) |
| End of day | Log activity, follow-ups |

---

### This Week's Focus

**Theme:** Discovery — learn about agents, don't pitch

| Day | Focus | Target |
|-----|-------|--------|
| Mon | Course Day 1 | Review Day 1 |
| Tue | Course Day 2 | Review Day 2 |
| Wed | Pipeline review | Update prospect list |
| Thu | Outreach | 5 cold reachouts |
| Fri | Networking | 1 COI meeting |
| Sat | Content | Record TikToks |
| Sun | Rest/Planning | Week review |

---

### Key Metrics This Week

- [ ] Outreach count: _
- [ ] Conversations started: _
- [ ] Interviews scheduled: _
- [ ] Offers extended: _
